candidates.why: Separate operating D&A component is shown, but nothing indicates it belongs to Raw Materials and Consumables / COGS specifically.
Separate operating D&A component is shown, but it is not labelled as COGS-related and may relate to overhead instead.
Separate amortization line is present, but there is no evidence it belongs to the selected COGS bucket.

variables.notes: Selected COGS bucket is only 'Raw Materials and Consumables'. The visible D&A rows are separate operating lines with no COGS/COR labeling, so there is insufficient evidence to add any of them to COGS specifically.

candidates.why: Explicit separate operating D&A line item outside the selected XSGA component rows; should be added separately rather than assumed embedded in Personnel Costs / Other external expenses / Other operating expenses.
Explicit separate operating D&A component presented alongside other operating expenses, not as a sub-component of the selected XSGA rows.
Explicit separate amortization component shown in the operating section and not embedded in the selected XSGA component rows.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA bucket consists of 'Personnel Costs', 'Other external expenses', and 'Other operating expenses'. D&A is presented separately at the same operating-expense level, so it should be added separately. The broader row 'Depreciation,  Amortization and Impairment' is not used because it includes impairment, which must be excluded.
